If they aren’t on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.

Dispelling Evil and Good.description: For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions: Break Enchantment or Dismissal.
Dispelling Evil and Good.name: Dispelling Evil and Good

Dismissal.name: Dismissal
Dismissal.target: Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead

Break Enchantment.name: Break Enchantment
Break Enchantment.target: Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell’s level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

【升環法術效應】 You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell’s level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Dissonant Whispers.name: 噪音暗語
Dissonant Whispers.description:
在法術範圍內選擇一個你所能看見的生物，在其腦中響起不和諧的旋律，目標進行一次感知豁免檢定。豁免失敗時，其承受3d6心靈傷害，且如果可能的話，必須立即使用其反應以最安全的路線盡可能遠離你。豁免成功時，目標只承受一半的傷害。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，傷害將再增加1d6。

Divination.name: 預言術
Divination.description:
This spell puts you in contact with a god or a god’s servants. You ask one question about a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. The DM offers a truthful reply, which might be a short phrase or cryptic rhyme. The spell doesn’t account for circumstances that might change the answer, such as the casting of other spells.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Divine Favor.name: 神恩術
Divine Favor.description: 直到法術結束前，你的武器攻擊命中時造成額外1d4光耀傷害。

Divine Smite.name: 至聖斬
Divine Smite.description:
被攻擊的目標承受額外2d8光耀傷害，若目標為邪魔或不死生物，則傷害提升1d8。

【升環施法效應】法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d8。

Divine Word.name: 聖言術
Divine Word.description:
You utter a word imbued with power from the Upper Planes. Each creature of your choice in range makes a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, a target that has 50 Hit Points or fewer suffers an effect based on its current Hit Points, as shown in the Divine Word Effects table. Regardless of its Hit Points, a Celestial, an Elemental, a Fey, or a Fiend target that fails its save is forced back to its plane of origin (if it isn’t there already) and can’t return to the current plane for 24 hours by any means short of a @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell.

Hit PointsDivine Word Effect
0–20The target dies.
21–30The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false]{目盲}, &Reference[Deafened apply=false]{耳聾}, and &Reference[Stunned apply=false] conditions for 1 hour.
31–40The target has the Blinded and Deafened conditions for 10 minutes.
41–50The target has the Deafened condition for 1 minute.

Dominate Monster.name: 支配怪物
Dominate Monster.description:
One creature you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false]{魅惑} condition for the duration. The target has Advantage on the save if you or your allies are fighting it. Whenever the target takes damage, it repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

You have a telepathic link with the Charmed target while the two of you are on the same plane of existence. On your turn, you can use this link to issue commands to the target (no action required), such as “Attack that creature,” “Move over there,” or “Fetch that object.” The target does its best to obey on its turn. If it completes an order and doesn’t receive further direction from you, it acts and moves as it likes, focusing on protecting itself.

You can command the target to take a Reaction but must take your own Reaction to do so.

【升環法術效應】 Your Concentration can last longer with a level 9 spell slot (up to 8 hours).

Dominated.name: Dominated
Dominated.description: Whenever the target takes damage, it repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Dominate Person.name: 支配人類
Dominate Person.description:
One Humanoid you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false]{魅惑} condition for the duration. The target has Advantage on the save if you or your allies are fighting it. Whenever the target takes damage, it repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

You have a telepathic link with the Charmed target while the two of you are on the same plane of existence. On your turn, you can use this link to issue commands to the target (no action required), such as “Attack that creature,” “Move over there,” or “Fetch that object.” The target does its best to obey on its turn. If it completes an order and doesn’t receive further direction from you, it acts and moves as it likes, focusing on protecting itself.

You can command the target to take a Reaction but must take your own Reaction to do so.

【升環法術效應】 Your Concentration can last longer with a spell slot of level 6 (up to 10 minutes), 7 (up to 1 hour), or 8+ (up to 8 hours).

Dominated.name: Dominated
Dominated.description: 每當被&Reference[charmed apply=false]{魅惑}的目標承受傷害時，其重複進行[[/save ability=wis]]豁免，並在其成功時結束法術。

Dragon's Breath.name: 龍息術
Dragon's Breath.description:
你觸碰一個自願生物，並選擇強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電或毒素。直到法術結束前，目標可以採取魔法動作來呼出一道15呎錐形區域的吐息。每個處於該區域內的生物進行一次敏捷豁免，失敗時承受3d6所選擇類型的傷害，成功時承受一半的傷害。

【升環法術效應】 法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d6。

Drawmij's Instant Summons.name: 卓姆吉瞬間召喚
Drawmij's Instant Summons.description:
You touch the sapphire used in the casting and an object weighing 10 pounds or less whose longest dimension is 6 feet or less. The spell leaves an Invisible mark on that object and invisibly inscribes the object’s name on the sapphire. Each time you cast this spell, you must use a different sapphire.

Thereafter, you can take a Magic action to speak the object’s name and crush the sapphire. The object instantly appears in your hand regardless of physical or planar distances, and the spell ends.

If another creature is holding or carrying the object, crushing the sapphire doesn’t transport it, but instead you learn who that creature is and where that creature is currently located.

Foundry Note

This spell's Limited Uses are configured to track the number of inscribed objects, with the "Inscribe" and "Recall" activities restoring and consuming uses as appropriate.

Dream.name: 託夢術
Dream.description:
You target a creature you know on the same plane of existence. You or a willing creature you touch enters a trance state to act as a dream messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] and has a Speed of 0.

If the target is asleep, the messenger appears in the target’s dreams and can converse with the target as long as it remains asleep, through the spell’s duration. The messenger can also shape the dream’s environment, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the spell. The target recalls the dream perfectly upon waking.

If the target is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the target to sleep, at which point the messenger enters its dreams.

You can make the messenger terrifying to the target. If you do so, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words, and then the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target gains no benefit from its rest, and it takes 3d6 Psychic damage when it wakes up.

Trance State.description: While in the trance, the messenger is Incapacitated and has a Speed of 0.
Trance State.name: Trance State

Druidcraft.name: 德魯伊伎倆
Druidcraft.description:
向自然界的靈體低語，你在範圍內創造出以下效果之一。

【天氣預報】 你創造一個微小且無害的感覺效果，以預測你所在地點未來24小時的天氣狀況。這個效果可能會表現為金色光球以預示晴朗的天空、一朵雲彩以預示下雨、飄落的雪花以預示下雪等等。這個效果持續1輪。

【開花】 你立即使一朵花苞綻放、一個種子莢打開，或者一個嫩葉萌發。

【感官效果】你創造一個無害的感覺效果，例如落葉、飛舞的幻影仙靈、輕柔的微風、動物的聲音，或是淡淡的臭鼬氣味。這個效果必須在 5 呎的立方體空間內。

【玩火】 你點燃或熄滅一支蠟燭、一支火把或一個篝火。

Earthquake.name: 地震術
Earthquake.description:
Choose a point on the ground that you can see within range. For the duration, an intense tremor rips through the ground in a 100-foot-radius circle centered on that point. The ground there is Difficult Terrain.

When you cast this spell and at the end of each of your turns for the duration, each creature on the ground in the area makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature has the &Reference[Prone] condition, and its Concentration is broken.

You can also cause the effects below.

Fissures. A total of [[/r 1d6]] fissures open in the spell’s area at the end of the turn you cast it. You choose the fissures’ locations, which can’t be under structures. Each fissure is [[/r 1d10 * 10]] feet deep and 10 feet wide, and it extends from one edge of the spell’s area to another edge. A creature in the same space as a fissure must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall in. A creature that successfully saves moves with the fissure’s edge as it opens.

Structures. The tremor deals [[/damage 50 type=bludgeoning]] damage to any structure in contact with the ground in the area when you cast the spell and at the end of each of your turns until the spell ends. If a structure drops to 0 Hit Points, it collapses.

A creature within a distance from a collapsing structure equal to half the structure’s height makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 12d6 Bludgeoning damage, has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=20]] check as an action to escape. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only.

End of Turn Fissures.name: End of Turn Fissures
End of Turn Fissures.condition: end of turn of initial casting

Collapsing Structure Save.name: Collapsing Structure Save
Collapsing Structure Save.condition: when a structure drops to 0 Hit Points

Buried in Rubble.description: On a failed save, the creature takes 12d6 Bludgeoning damage, has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=20]] check as an action to escape.
Buried in Rubble.name: Buried in Rubble

Eldritch Blast.name: 魔能爆
Eldritch Blast.description:
你投擲出一束劈啪作響的能量。對範圍內一個生物或物體進行遠程法術攻擊。命中時，目標承受1d10立場傷害。

【戲法升級】5級時，本法術會創造兩束能量，11級時創造三束能量，17級時創造四束能量。你可以將能量束指向同一個目標或者不同的目標。為每束能量單獨骰攻擊檢定。

[[(floor((@details.level+1)/6)+1)]]{總能量束}

Elemental Weapon.name: 元素武器
Elemental Weapon.description:
A nonmagical weapon you touch becomes a magic weapon. Choose one of the following damage types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. For the duration, the weapon has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and deals an extra 1d4 damage of the chosen type when it hits.

【升環法術效應】 If you use a level 5–6 spell slot, the bonus to attack rolls increases to +2, and the extra damage increases to 2d4. If you use a level 7+ spell slot, the bonus increases to +3, and the extra damage increases to 3d4.

Elementalism.name: 元素技倆
Elementalism.description:
你運用對元素的控制，在射程內創造下列效果中的一種。

【喚風】你創造出一股足夠強的微風，可以在一個5立方呎區域內掀動衣物、揚起灰塵、使樹葉沙沙作響，或者關閉敞開的門窗。如果門和百葉窗被某人或某物維持敞開，則其不受影響。

【喚土】你創造出一層薄薄的塵土或沙塵，覆蓋5平方呎的區域內的表面，或者讓一個單字以你的筆跡出現在一片泥土或沙地上。

【喚火】你在5立方呎區域內創造出一團無害的火星和彩色、有香味的煙霧。你選擇顏色和香味，且火星可以點燃該區域內的蠟燭、火把或燈具。煙霧的香味持續1分鐘。

【喚水】你在5立方呎區域內創造出一陣涼爽的霧氣，輕微地濕潤生物和物體。或者，你在開放的容器內或表面上創造出1杯清水，這些水會在1分鐘後蒸發。

【塑形元素】只要是能裝進1立方呎內的土、沙子、火、煙、霧或水，你就能使它呈現出一個粗糙的形狀（比如形如一個生物），持續 1 小時。

Beckon Element.name: 引導元素
Beckon Element.chatFlavor: 喚火與喚水持續 1 分鐘

Enhance Ability.name: 強化屬性
Enhance Ability.description:
你觸碰一個生物，並選擇力量、敏捷、智力、感知或魅力。法術持續時間內，目標在相應屬性檢定中具有優勢。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，就可以額外選擇一個生物。你可以為每個目標選擇不同的屬性。

Enhanced Dexterity.name: 強化敏捷
Enhanced Dexterity.description: 目標在相應屬性檢定中具有優勢。

Enhanced Strength.description: 目標在相應屬性檢定中具有優勢。
Enhanced Strength.name: 強化力量

Enhanced Charisma.description: 目標在相應屬性檢定中具有優勢。
Enhanced Charisma.name: 強化魅力

Enhanced Wisdom.name: 強化感知
Enhanced Wisdom.description: 目標在相應屬性檢定中具有優勢。

Enhanced Intelligence.name: 強化智力
Enhanced Intelligence.description: 目標在相應屬性檢定中具有優勢。

Enlarge/Reduce.name: 變巨/縮小術
Enlarge/Reduce.description:
For the duration, the spell enlarges or reduces a creature or an object you can see within range (see the chosen effect below). A targeted object must be neither worn nor carried. If the target is an unwilling creature, it can make a Constitution saving throw. On a successful save, the spell has no effect.

Everything that a targeted creature is wearing and carrying changes size with it. Any item it drops returns to normal size at once. A thrown weapon or piece of ammunition returns to normal size immediately after it hits or misses a target.

Enlarge. The target’s size increases by one category—from Medium to Large, for example. The target also has Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target’s attacks with its enlarged weapons or Unarmed Strikes deal an extra 1d4 damage on a hit.

Reduce. The target’s size decreases by one category—from Medium to Small, for example. The target also has Disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target’s attacks with its reduced weapons or Unarmed Strikes deal 1d4 less damage on a hit (this can’t reduce the damage below 1).

Reduced.name: Reduced
Reduced.description: The target’s size decreases by one category—from Medium to Small, for example. The target also has Disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target’s attacks with its reduced weapons or Unarmed Strikes deal 1d4 less damage on a hit (this can’t reduce the damage below 1).

Enlarged.description: The target’s size increases by one category—from Medium to Large, for example. The target also has Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target’s attacks with its enlarged weapons or Unarmed Strikes deal an extra 1d4 damage on a hit.
Enlarged.name: Enlarged

Ensnaring Strike.name: 誘捕打擊
Ensnaring Strike.description:
當你命中目標時，纏繞的藤蔓會出現在其身上，其進行一次力量豁免。大型或更大的生物在此豁免上具有優勢。豁免失敗時，直到法術結束前目標陷入&Reference[restrained apply=false]{束縛}狀態。豁免成功時，藤蔓枯萎消失，且法術結束。

被束縛時，目標在其每回合開始時承受1d6穿刺傷害。目標或能夠觸及其的生物可以採取一個動作，[[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spelldc]]檢定，對抗你的法術豁免DC。成功時，法術結束。

【升環法術效應】 法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d6。

Ensnared.name: 誘捕
Ensnared.description:
直到法術結束前目標陷入&Reference[restrained apply=false]{束縛}狀態。

被束縛時，目標在其每回合開始時承受[[/damage 1d6 type=piercing]]（每個高於1環的法術位環階加上1d6）傷害。目標或能夠觸及其的生物可以採取一個動作，[[/check ability=str skill=ath]]檢定，對抗你的法術豁免DC。成功時，法術結束。

Entangle.name: 糾纏術
Entangle.description:
射程內一片20呎方形區域地面上生長出盤根錯節的植物。法術持續期間內，這些植物使得該區域內的地面變成了&Reference[difficultterrain]{困難地形}。當法術結束時植物消失。

當你施放法術時，區域內的每個生物（除了你自己）必須通過一次力量豁免，否則直到法術結束前陷入&Reference[restrained apply=false]{束縛}狀態。一個處於束縛的生物可以採取一個動作，進行一次 [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spelldc]]檢定，對抗你的法術豁免DC。成功時，其能從攀緣植物中解脫出來，不再被植物束縛。

Restrained.description: 一個處於束縛的生物可以採取一個動作，進行一次[[/check ability=str skill=ath]]檢定，對抗你的法術豁免DC。成功時，其能從攀緣植物中解脫出來，不再被植物束縛。
Restrained.name: 束縛

Enthrall.name: 注目術
Enthrall.description: 你編織了一系列令人分心的言辭，選擇射程內你所能看見的任意數量的生物，迫使其進行一次感知豁免。任何生物，你或你的同伴正在戰鬥中的生物在此豁免上自動成功。豁免失敗時，直到法術結束前目標進行感知（察覺）檢定時會承受-10的罰值，並且被動察覺也會降低同樣數值。

Distracted.name: 分心
Distracted.description: 直到法術結束前目標進行[[/check ability=wis skill=prc]]檢定時會承受-10的罰值，並且被動察覺也會降低同樣數值。

Etherealness.name: 跨入乙太界
Etherealness.description:
You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, where it overlaps with your current plane. You remain in the Border Ethereal for the duration. During this time, you can move in any direction. If you move up or down, every foot of movement costs an extra foot. You can perceive the plane you left, which looks gray, and you can’t see anything there more than 60 feet away.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can affect and be affected only by creatures, objects, and effects on that plane. Creatures that aren’t on the Ethereal Plane can’t perceive or interact with you unless a feature gives them the ability to do so.

When the spell ends, you return to the plane you left in the spot that corresponds to your space in the Border Ethereal. If you appear in an occupied space, you are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and take Force damage equal to twice the number of feet you are moved.

This spell ends instantly if you cast it while you are on the Ethereal Plane or a plane that doesn’t border it, such as one of the Outer Planes.

【升環法術效應】You can target up to three willing creatures (including yourself) for each spell slot level above 7. The creatures must be within 10 feet of you when you cast the spell.

Evard's Black Tentacles.name: 艾伐黑觸手
Evard's Black Tentacles.description:
Squirming, ebony tentacles fill a 20-foot square on ground that you can see within range. For the duration, these tentacles turn the ground in that area into &Reference[DifficultTerrain].

Each creature in that area makes a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 3d6 Bludgeoning damage, and it has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the spell ends. A creature also makes that save if it enters the area or ends it turn there. A creature makes that save only once per turn.

A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spelldc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the condition on itself on a success.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: A &Reference[Restrained apply=false] creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the condition on itself on a success.

Expeditious Retreat.name: 腳底抹油
Expeditious Retreat.description: You take the Dash action, and until the spell ends, you can take that action again as a Bonus Action.

Eyebite.name: 攝心目光
Eyebite.description:
For the duration, your eyes become an inky void. One creature of your choice within 60 feet of you that you can see must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected by one of the following effects of your choice for the duration.

On each of your turns until the spell ends, you can take a Magic action to target another creature but can’t target a creature again if it has succeeded on a save against this casting of the spell.

Asleep. The target has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition. It wakes up if it takes any damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.

Panicked. The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false]{恐懼} condition. On each of its turns, the Frightened target must take the &Reference[Dash] action and move away from you by the safest and shortest route available. If the target moves to a space at least 60 feet away from you where it can’t see you, this effect ends.

Sickened. The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition.

Asleep.description: The target has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition. It wakes up if it takes any damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.
Asleep.name: 睡眠

Panicked.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false]{恐懼} condition. On each of its turns, the Frightened target must take the &Reference[Dash] action and move away from you by the safest and shortest route available. If the target moves to a space at least 60 feet away from you where it can’t see you, this effect ends.
Panicked.name: Panicked

Fabricate.name: 鬼斧神工
Fabricate.description:
You convert raw materials into products of the same material. For example, you can fabricate a wooden bridge from a clump of trees, a rope from a patch of hemp, or clothes from flax or wool.

Choose raw materials that you can see within range. You can fabricate a Large or smaller object (contained within a 10-foot Cube or eight connected 5-foot Cubes) given a sufficient quantity of material. If you’re working with metal, stone, or another mineral substance, however, the fabricated object can be no larger than Medium (contained within a 5-foot Cube). The quality of any fabricated objects is based on the quality of the raw materials.

Creatures and magic items can’t be created by this spell. You also can’t use it to create items that require a high degree of skill—such as weapons and armor—unless you have proficiency with the type of Artisan’s Tools used to craft such objects.

Faerie Fire.name: 妖火術
Faerie Fire.description:
射程內20立方呎區域內的物體將被藍色、綠色或堇紫色的光勾勒出輪廓（由你選擇）。每個在立方體內敏捷豁免失敗的生物，也會被勾勒出輪廓。在法術持續時間內，物體和受影響的生物會在散發出10呎&Reference[dimlight]{微光}，並且不能從隱形狀態中獲益。

若攻擊者可以看到受影響的生物或物體，則對其的攻擊檢定就具有優勢。

Outlined.name: 勾勒輪廓
Outlined.description:
在法術持續時間內，物體和受影響的生物會在散發出10呎&Reference[dimlight]{微光}，並且不能從隱形狀態中獲益。

若攻擊者可以看到受影響的生物或物體，則對其的攻擊檢定就具有優勢。

False Life.name: 摹造生命
False Life.description:
你獲得2d4 + 4的臨時生命值。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，你就可以獲得額外5點臨時生命值。

Fear.name: 恐懼術
Fear.description:
Each creature in a 30-foot Cone must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or drop whatever it is holding and have the &Reference[frightened apply=false] condition for the duration.

A Frightened creature takes the &Reference[dash] action and moves away from you by the safest route on each of its turns unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a space where it doesn’t have line of sight to you, the creature makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends on that creature.

Fear.name: Fear
Fear.description: A &Reference[frightened apply=false] creature takes the &Reference[dash] action and moves away from you by the safest route on each of its turns unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a space where it doesn’t have line of sight to you, the creature makes a [[/save ability=wis]] saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends on that creature.

Feather Fall.name: 羽落術
Feather Fall.description: 選擇射程內最多五個正在下落的生物。一個生物正在下落時的下降速度直到法術結束前減慢至每輪60呎。若一個生物在法術結束前著陸，該生物不會因墜落而承受任何傷害，且該生物上的法術結束。

Feign Death.name: 假死術
Feign Death.description:
You touch a willing creature and put it into a cataleptic state that is indistinguishable from death.

For the duration, the target appears dead to outward inspection and to spells used to determine the target’s status. The target has the &Reference[blinded apply=false]{目盲} and &Reference[incapacitated apply=false]{無力} conditions, and its Speed is 0.

The target also has Resistance to all damage except Psychic damage, and it has Immunity to the Poisoned condition.

Find Familiar.name: 尋獲魔寵
Find Familiar.description:
一隻魔寵前來服務你。這個靈體有著你所選擇的動物形態：蝙蝠、貓、青蛙、獵鷹、蜥蜴、章魚、貓頭鷹、老鼠、渡鴉、蜘蛛、鼬，或其他挑戰等級為0的野獸。魔寵在射程內未被佔據的空間出現，魔寵具有所選形態的資料（見附錄B），不過其是天界、妖精或邪魔生物（由你選擇）而非野獸。你的魔寵將獨立行動， 但其會服從你的命令。

【心靈感應連接】當魔寵在你100呎內時，你可以與其通過心靈感應交流。此外，作為附贈動作，直到你下回合開始前，你可以通過魔寵的眼睛看東西，聽到其聽到的聲音，並獲得其所擁有的任何特殊感官的好處。

最後，當你施放一個射程為觸碰的法術時，你的魔寵可以傳遞該觸碰。你的魔寵必須在你100呎內，並且當你施放法術時，其必須採取反應來傳遞該觸碰。

【戰鬥】魔寵是你的同伴以及你同伴的同伴。其擲自己的先攻並在自己的回合行動。魔寵不能攻擊，但可以正常採取其他動作。

【魔寵消失】當魔寵的生命值減少至0點時，其將消失。在你再次施放此法術後重新出現。作為魔法動作，你可以暫時將魔寵解散至一個口袋維度。或者，你可以永久性地解散。當魔寵暫解散時作為一個魔法動作，你可以使其在你30呎內一個未被佔據的空間重新出現。每當魔寵的生命值降至0點或消失進入口袋維度時，其將所穿著或攜帶的所有物品留在其原本的空間。

【只有一個魔寵】 你不能同時擁有多個的魔寵。若你在已有魔寵時施放此法術，你轉而將原有魔寵轉變成一個新的符合條件的形態。

Find Steed.name: 尋獲坐騎
Find Steed.description:
You summon an otherworldly being that appears as a loyal steed in an unoccupied space of your choice within range. This creature uses the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobOtherworld]{Otherworldly Steed} stat block. If you already have a steed from this spell, the steed is replaced by the new one.

The steed resembles a Large, rideable animal of your choice, such as a horse, a camel, a dire wolf, or an elk. Whenever you cast the spell, choose the steed’s creature type—Celestial, Fey, or Fiend—which determines certain traits in the stat block.

Combat. The steed is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, it shares your Initiative count, and it functions as a &Reference[controllingamount]{controlled mount} while you ride it (as defined in the rules on mounted combat). If you have the Incapacitated condition, the steed takes its turn immediately after yours and acts independently, focusing on protecting you.

Disappearance of the Steed. The steed disappears if it drops to 0 Hit Points or if you die. When it disappears, it leaves behind anything it was wearing or carrying. If you cast this spell again, you decide whether you summon the steed that disappeared or a different one.

【升環法術效應】 Use the spell slot’s level for the spell’s level in the stat block.

In addition to the noted usage of the spell's level in the steed's Traits and Actions, the following attributes are also affected.

Otherworldly Steed
AC10 + 1 per spell level
HP5 + 10 per spell level (the steed has a number of Hit Dice [d10s] equal to the spell’s level)
Speed60 ft., Fly 60 ft. (requires level 4+ spell)
PBequals your Proficiency Bonus

Foundry Note

The Summon Flying Steed activity should be used when consuming a fourth level or higher spell slot and is configured to apply the Fly Speed.

When using a second or third level spell slot, the Summon Steed activity should be used instead.

Flying Steed.description: The steed has a Fly speed of 60ft. when summoned by a level 4+ spell.
Flying Steed.name: Flying Steed

Find the Path.name: 尋找捷徑
Find the Path.description:
You magically sense the most direct physical route to a location you name. You must be familiar with the location, and the spell fails if you name a destination on another plane of existence, a moving destination (such as a mobile fortress), or an unspecific destination (such as “a green dragon’s lair”).

For the duration, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the destination, you know how far it is and in what direction it lies. Whenever you face a choice of paths along the way there, you know which path is the most direct.

Find Traps.name: 尋找陷阱
Find Traps.description:
你感知到射程內、視線範圍的任何陷阱。對於這個法術而言，「陷阱」包括任何被製造出來以造成傷害或其他危險的物體或機制。因此，這個法術可以感知到警報或者警戒符文法術，或是一個機械的陷阱坑，但其不會揭示地板上的天然薄弱處、不穩定的天花板或隱蔽的天然陷坑。

此法術將揭示陷阱的存在，但不會指明其位置。你還是能瞭解到你所感知到的陷阱所構成危險的大致性質。

Finger of Death.name: 死亡一指
Finger of Death.description:
You unleash negative energy toward a creature you can see within range. The target makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 7d8 + 30 Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

A Humanoid killed by this spell rises at the start of your next turn as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobZombie0000]{Zombie} (see appendix B) that follows your verbal orders.

Fire Bolt.name: 火焰箭
Fire Bolt.description:
你對射程內一個生物或物體投擲出一縷火焰。對目標發動一次遠程法術攻擊，命中時目標承受1d10火焰傷害。被此法術命中的可燃物，若未被穿著或攜帶，則其將開始燃燒。

【戲法升級】當你達到特定等級時傷害增加：5級2d10、11級3d10、17級4d10。

Fire Shield.name: 火焰護盾
Fire Shield.description:
Wispy flames wreathe your body for the duration, shedding Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

The flames provide you with a warm shield or a chill shield, as you choose. The warm shield grants you Resistance to Cold damage, and the chill shield grants you Resistance to Fire damage.

In addition, whenever a creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack roll, the shield erupts with flame. The attacker takes [[/damage 2d8 type=fire]] damage from a warm shield or [[/damage 2d8 type=cold]] damage from a chill shield.

Warm Shield.name: Warm Shield
Warm Shield.description: Whenever a creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack roll, the attacker takes [[/damage 2d8 type=fire]] damage.

Chill Shield.description: Whenever a creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack roll, the attacker takes [[/damage 2d8 type=cold]] damage.
Chill Shield.name: Chill Shield

Flame Eruption.condition: a creature within 5 feet hits you with a melee attack
Flame Eruption.name: Flame Eruption

Fire Storm.name: 火焰風暴
Fire Storm.description:
A storm of fire appears within range. The area of the storm consists of up to ten 10-foot Cubes, which you arrange as you like. Each Cube must be contiguous with at least one other Cube. Each creature in the area makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 7d10 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Flammable objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried start burning.

Fireball.name: 火球術
Fireball.description:
A bright streak flashes from you to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into a fiery explosion. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Flammable objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried start burning.

【升環法術效應】 The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

Flame Blade.name: 火焰刀
Flame Blade.description:
You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a scimitar, and it lasts for the duration. If you let go of the blade, it disappears, but you can evoke it again as a Bonus Action.

As a Magic action, you can make a melee spell attack with the fiery blade. On a hit, the target takes Fire damage equal to 3d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

The flaming blade sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

【升環法術效應】 法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d6。

Flame Strike.name: 焰擊術
Flame Strike.description:
A vertical column of brilliant fire roars down from above. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d6 Fire damage and 5d6 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

【升環法術效應】 The Fire damage and the Radiant damage increase by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 5.

Flaming Sphere.name: 熾焰法球
Flaming Sphere.description:
You create a 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere makes a [[/save ability=dex dc=@attributes.spelldc]] saving throw, taking 2d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet, rolling it along the ground. If you move the sphere into a creature’s space, that creature makes the save against the sphere, and the sphere stops moving for the turn.

When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 feet tall and jump it across pits up to 10 feet wide. Flammable objects that aren’t being worn or carried start burning if touched by the sphere, and it sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet.

【升環法術效應】 法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d6。

Flesh to Stone.name: 石化術
Flesh to Stone.description:
You attempt to turn one creature that you can see within range into stone. The target makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition for the duration. On a successful save, its Speed is 0 until the start of your next turn. Constructs automatically succeed on the save.

A Restrained target makes another Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves against this spell three times, the spell ends. If it fails its saves three times, it is turned to stone and has the &Reference[Petrified] condition for the duration. The successes and failures needn’t be consecutive; keep track of both until the target collects three of a kind.

If you maintain your Concentration on this spell for the entire possible duration, the target is Petrified until the condition is ended by @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration} or similar magic.

Unable to Move.name: Unable to Move
Unable to Move.description: On a successful save, its Speed is 0 until the start of your next turn.

Turning to Stone.name: Turning to Stone
Turning to Stone.description: A &Reference[Restrained apply=false] target makes another [[/save ability=con format=long]] at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves against this spell three times, the spell ends. If it fails its saves three times, it is turned to stone and has the &Reference[Petrified] condition for the duration.

Fly.name: 飛行術
Fly.description:
You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet and can hover. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft unless it can stop the fall.

【升環法術效應】 You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Fog Cloud.name: 雲霧術
Fog Cloud.description:
你在射程內以一個點為中心，創造出一個半徑20呎的球形霧氣。球狀區域內屬於&Reference[heavilyobscured]。其將持續存在至法術結束，或者直到強風（比如由 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGustofWind]創造的風）將其吹散。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，雲霧半徑就增加20呎。

Forbiddance.name: 禁制術
Forbiddance.description:
You create a ward against magical travel that protects up to 40,000 square feet of floor space to a height of 30 feet above the floor. For the duration, creatures can’t teleport into the area or use portals, such as those created by the Gate spell, to enter the area. The spell proofs the area against planar travel, and therefore prevents creatures from accessing the area by way of the Astral Plane, the Ethereal Plane, the Feywild, the Shadowfell, or the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift} spell.

In addition, the spell damages types of creatures that you choose when you cast it. Choose one or more of the following: Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead. When a creature of a chosen type enters the spell’s area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there, the creature takes 5d10 Radiant or Necrotic damage (your choice when you cast this spell).

You can designate a password when you cast the spell. A creature that speaks the password as it enters the area takes no damage from the spell.

The spell’s area can’t overlap with the area of another Forbiddance spell. If you cast Forbiddance every day for 30 days in the same location, the spell lasts until it is dispelled, and the Material components are consumed on the last casting.

Damage Forbidden Creature.condition: creature of a chosen type enters the spell’s area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there
Damage Forbidden Creature.name: Damage Forbidden Creature

Forcecage.name: 力場監牢
Forcecage.description:
An immobile, Invisible, Cube-shaped prison composed of magical force springs into existence around an area you choose within range. The prison can be a cage or a solid box, as you choose.

A prison in the shape of a cage can be up to 20 feet on a side and is made from 1/2-inch diameter bars spaced 1/2 inch apart. A prison in the shape of a box can be up to 10 feet on a side, creating a solid barrier that prevents any matter from passing through it and blocking any spells cast into or out from the area.

When you cast the spell, any creature that is completely inside the cage’s area is trapped. Creatures only partially within the area, or those too large to fit inside it, are pushed away from the center of the area until they are completely outside it.

A creature inside the cage can’t leave it by nonmagical means. If the creature tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to leave, it must first make a [[/save ability=cha dc=@attributes.spelldc format=long]]. On a successful save, the creature can use that magic to exit the cage. On a failed save, the creature doesn’t exit the cage and wastes the spell or effect. The cage also extends into the Ethereal Plane, blocking ethereal travel.

This spell can’t be dispelled by Dispel Magic.

Foresight.name: 預視術
Foresight.description: You touch a willing creature and bestow a limited ability to see into the immediate future. For the duration, the target has Advantage on D20 Tests, and other creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls against it. The spell ends early if you cast it again.
For the duration, the target has Advantage on D20 Tests, and other creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls against it.
Foresight.name: Foresight

Fount of Moonlight.name: 月光源泉
Fount of Moonlight.description:
A cool light wreathes your body for the duration, emitting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet.

Until the spell ends, you have Resistance to Radiant damage, and your melee attacks deal an extra 2d6 Radiant damage on a hit.

In addition, immediately after you take damage from a creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself, you can take a Reaction to force the creature to make a [[/save ability=con dc=@attributes.spelldc]] saving throw. On a failed save, the creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false]{目盲} condition until the end of your next turn.

Blinded.name: Blinded
Blinded.description: The creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false]{目盲} condition until the end of your next turn.

Blinding Reaction.condition: you take damage from a creature you can see within range
Blinding Reaction.name: Blinding Reaction

Freedom of Movement.name: 行動自如術
Freedom of Movement.description:
You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target’s movement is unaffected by &Reference[DifficultTerrain], and spells and other magical effects can neither reduce the target’s Speed nor cause the target to have the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] or &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions. The target also has a Swim Speed equal to its Speed.

In addition, the target can spend 5 feet of movement to automatically escape from nonmagical restraints, such as manacles or a creature imposing the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition on it.

【升環法術效應】 You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 4.

Foundry Note

The Active Effect provided by the Cast activity upgrades the character's Swim Speed to a value of "1" to indicate equivalence to (walk) Speed, in addition to the condition immunities.

Friends.name: 交友術
Friends.description:
你神奇地向射程內一個你所能看見的生物散發出友誼的感覺。目標必須通過一次感知豁免，否則將在法術持續時間內陷入&Reference[Charmed apply=false]{魅惑}狀態。若目標不是類人生物，或是你正與其戰鬥，或是在過去24小時內你已經對其施放此法術時，則目標將自動豁免成功。

若目標承受傷害，或者你進行攻擊檢定、造成傷害、迫使任何人進行豁免檢定，則法術將提前結束。當法術結束時，目標會知道其曾被你魅惑。

Charmed.description: 目標法術持續時間內陷入&Reference[Charmed apply=false]{魅惑}狀態。目標承受傷害，或者你進行攻擊檢定、造成傷害、迫使任何人進行豁免檢定，則法術將提前結束。當法術結束時，目標會知道其曾被你魅惑。
Charmed.name: 魅惑

Gaseous Form.name: 氣化形體
Gaseous Form.description:
A willing creature you touch shape-shifts, along with everything it’s wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends on the target if it drops to 0 Hit Points or if it takes a Magic action to end the spell on itself.

While in this form, the target’s only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false]{伏地} condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can’t talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can’t attack or cast spells.

【升環法術效應】 You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

The target’s only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false]{伏地} condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can’t talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can’t attack or cast spells.
Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form

Gate.name: 異界之門
Gate.description:
You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to a precise location on a different plane of existence. The portal is a circular opening, which you can make 5 to 20 feet in diameter. You can orient the portal in any direction you choose. The portal lasts for the duration, and the portal’s destination is visible through it.

The portal has a front and a back on each plane where it appears. Travel through the portal is possible only by moving through its front. Anything that does so is instantly transported to the other plane, appearing in the unoccupied space nearest to the portal.

Deities and other planar rulers can prevent portals created by this spell from opening in their presence or anywhere within their domains.

When you cast this spell, you can speak the name of a specific creature (a pseudonym, title, or nickname doesn’t work). If that creature is on a plane other than the one you are on, the portal opens next to the named creature and transports it to the nearest unoccupied space on your side of the portal. You gain no special power over the creature, and it is free to act as the DM deems appropriate. It might leave, attack you, or help you.

Geas.name: 指使術
Geas.description:
You give a verbal command to a creature that you can see within range, ordering it to carry out some service or refrain from an action or a course of activity as you decide. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false]{魅惑} condition for the duration. The target automatically succeeds if it can’t understand your command.

While Charmed, the creature takes [[/damage 5d10 type=psychic]] damage if it acts in a manner directly counter to your command. It takes this damage no more than once each day.

You can issue any command you choose, short of an activity that would result in certain death. Should you issue a suicidal command, the spell ends.

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell ends this spell.

【升環法術效應】 If you use a level 7 or 8 spell slot, the duration is 365 days. If you use a level 9 spell slot, the spell lasts until it is ended by one of the spells mentioned above.

Under Orders.name: Under Orders
Under Orders.description: While &Reference[Charmed apply=false]{魅惑}, the creature takes [[/damage 5d10 type=psyhic]] damage if it acts in a manner directly counter to your command. It takes this damage no more than once each day.

Gentle Repose.name: 遺體防腐
Gentle Repose.description:
你觸碰一具屍體或其他遺骸。在法術持續期間，目標將免於腐爛且不能被變成不死生物。

該法術也能有效的延長將復活目標的時間限制，因為在此法術影響下度過的時間將不會計入如喚醒死者等法術的時間限制中。

Giant Insect.name: 巨蟲術
Giant Insect.description:
You summon a giant centipede, spider, or wasp (chosen when you cast the spell). It manifests in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobGiantInsec]{Giant Insect} stat block. The form you choose determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends.

The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any, it takes the &Reference[Dodge] action and uses its movement to avoid danger.

【升環法術效應】 Use the spell slot’s level for the spell’s level in the stat block.

In addition to the noted usage of the spell's level in the insect's Traits and Actions, the following attributes are also affected.

Giant Insect
AC11 + the spell’s level
HP30 + 10 for each spell level above 4
Speed40 ft., Climb 40 ft., Fly 40 ft. (Wasp only)
PBequals your Proficiency Bonus

Glibness.name: 花言巧語
Glibness.description: 直到此法術結束前，當你進行魅力檢定時，你可以將你骰出的數值替換成15。此外，無論你說什麼，判斷你是否誠實的魔法將會認為你說的話都是實話。

Globe of Invulnerability.name: 法術無效結界
Globe of Invulnerability.description:
An immobile, shimmering barrier appears in a 10-foot Emanation around you and remains for the duration.

Any spell of level 5 or lower cast from outside the barrier can’t affect anything within it. Such a spell can target creatures and objects within the barrier, but the spell has no effect on them. Similarly, the area within the barrier is excluded from areas of effect created by such spells.

【升環法術效應】 The barrier blocks spells of 1 level higher for each spell slot level above 6.

Spell levels blocked:[[@item.level - 1]] and lower

Glyph of Warding.name: 守衛銘文
Glyph of Warding.description:
You inscribe a glyph that later unleashes a magical effect. You inscribe it either on a surface (such as a table or a section of floor) or within an object that can be closed (such as a book or chest) to conceal the glyph. The glyph can cover an area no larger than 10 feet in diameter. If the surface or object is moved more than 10 feet from where you cast this spell, the glyph is broken, and the spell ends without being triggered.

The glyph is nearly imperceptible and requires a successful [[/check ability=wis skill=prc dc=@attributes.spelldc]] check against your spell save DC to notice.

When you inscribe the glyph, you set its trigger and choose whether it’s an explosive rune or a spell glyph, as explained below.

Set the Trigger. You decide what triggers the glyph when you cast the spell. For glyphs inscribed on a surface, common triggers include touching or stepping on the glyph, removing another object covering it, or approaching within a certain distance of it. For glyphs inscribed within an object, common triggers include opening that object or seeing the glyph. Once a glyph is triggered, this spell ends.

You can refine the trigger so that only creatures of certain types activate it (for example, the glyph could be set to affect Aberrations). You can also set conditions for creatures that don’t trigger the glyph, such as those who say a certain password.

Explosive Rune. When triggered, the glyph erupts with magical energy in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on the glyph. Each creature in the area makes a [[/save ability=dex dc=@attributes.spelldc]] saving throw. A creature takes 5d8 [[/damage (@item.level + 2)d8 type=acid]]{Acid}, [[/damage (@item.level + 2)d8 type=acid]]{Cold}, [[/damage (@item.level + 2)d8 type=acid]]{Fire}, [[/damage (@item.level + 2)d8 type=acid]]{Lightning}, or [[/damage (@item.level + 2)d8 type=acid]]{Thunder} damage (your choice when you create the glyph) on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Spell Glyph. You can store a prepared spell of level 3 or lower in the glyph by casting it as part of creating the glyph. The spell must target a single creature or an area. The spell being stored has no immediate effect when cast in this way.

When the glyph is triggered, the stored spell takes effect. If the spell has a target, it targets the creature that triggered the glyph. If the spell affects an area, the area is centered on that creature. If the spell summons Hostile creatures or creates harmful objects or traps, they appear as close as possible to the intruder and attack it. If the spell requires Concentration, it lasts until the end of its full duration.

【升環法術效應】 The damage of an explosive rune increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3. If you create a spell glyph, you can store any spell of up to the same level as the spell slot you use for the Glyph of Warding.

Foundry Note

The Explosive Rune activity allows you to choose the damage type in the roll dialog.

Goodberry.name: 神莓術
Goodberry.description:
@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbutlMagicalBer]{十顆莓果}出現在你的手中，並在持續時間內被注入魔法。一個生物可以採取附贈動作來吃一顆莓果。吃一顆莓果恢復1點生命值，並且這顆莓果提供足夠的營養來維持一個生物一天的需求。

未被吃掉的莓果在法術結束時消失。

Grasping Vine.name: 纏繞藤蔓
Grasping Vine.description:
You conjure a vine that sprouts from a surface in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The vine lasts for the duration.

Make a melee spell attack against a creature within 30 feet of the vine. On a hit, the target takes 4d8 Bludgeoning damage and is pulled up to 30 feet toward the vine; if the target is Huge or smaller, it has the &Reference[Grappled] condition (escape DC equal to your spell save DC). The vine can grapple only one creature at a time, and you can cause the vine to release a Grappled creature (no action required).

As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can repeat the attack against a creature within 30 feet of the vine.

【升環法術效應】 The number of creatures the vine can grapple increases by one for each spell slot level above 4.

Total number creatures able to be Grappled: [[@item.level - 3]]

Escape Tests

[[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spelldc]]

[[/check ability=dex skill=acr dc=@attributes.spelldc]]

Grease.name: 油膩術
Grease.description:
選擇射程內一點，在以此為中心10呎見方的區域中，不可燃的油脂憑空出現並覆蓋在地面上形成。法術持續時間內，這裡成為&Reference[difficultterrain]{困難地形}。

當油脂出現時，每個站在這個區域內的生物必須通過一次敏捷豁免，否則陷入&Reference[prone]{伏地}狀態。一個進入該這個區域，或在其內結束回合的生物也逼須通過該豁免，否則滑倒伏地。

Greater Invisibility.name: 高等隱形術
Greater Invisibility.description: 直到法術結束前，一個你所觸碰的生物獲得隱形狀態直到法術結束。

Greater Restoration.name: 高等復原術
Greater Restoration.description:
You touch a creature and magically remove one of the following effects from it:

  • 1 &Reference[Exhaustion] level
  • The &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Petrified] condition
  • A curse, including the target’s Attunement to a cursed magic item
  • Any reduction to one of the target’s ability scores
  • Any reduction to the target’s Hit Point maximum

Guardian of Faith.name: 虔誠守衛
Guardian of Faith.description:
A Large spectral guardian appears and hovers for the duration in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The guardian occupies that space and is invulnerable, and it appears in a form appropriate for your deity or pantheon.

Any enemy that moves to a space within 10 feet of the guardian for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The guardian vanishes when it has dealt a total of 60 damage.

Guards and Wards.name: 銅牆鐵壁
Guards and Wards.description:
You create a ward that protects up to 2,500 square feet of floor space. The warded area can be up to 20 feet tall, and you shape it as one 50-foot square, one hundred 5-foot squares that are contiguous, or twenty-five 10-foot squares that are contiguous.

When you cast this spell, you can specify individuals that are unaffected by the spell’s effects. You can also specify a password that, when spoken aloud within 5 feet of the warded area, makes the speaker immune to its effects.

The spell creates the effects below within the warded area. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic} has no effect on Guards and Wards itself, but each of the following effects can be dispelled. If all four are dispelled, Guards and Wards ends. If you cast the spell every day for 365 days on the same area, the spell thereafter lasts until all its effects are dispelled.

Corridors. Fog fills all the warded corridors, making them &Reference[HeavilyObscured]. In addition, at each intersection or branching passage offering a choice of direction, there is a 50 percent chance that a creature other than you believes it is going in the opposite direction from the one it chooses.

Doors. All doors in the warded area are magically locked, as if sealed by the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplArcaneLock]{Arcane Lock} spell. In addition, you can cover up to ten doors with an illusion to make them appear as plain sections of wall.

Stairs. Webs fill all stairs in the warded area from top to bottom, as in the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWeb0000000]{Web} spell. These strands regrow in 10 minutes if they are destroyed while Guards and Wards lasts.

Other Spell Effect. Place one of the following magical effects within the warded area:

  • @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDancingLig]{Dancing Lights} in four corridors, with a simple program that the lights repeat as long as Guards and Wards lasts
  • @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMagicMouth]{Magic Mouth} in two locations
  • @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplStinkingCl]{Stinking Cloud} in two locations (the vapors return within 10 minutes if dispersed while Guards and Wards lasts)
  • @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGustofWind]{Gust of Wind} in one corridor or room (the wind blows continuously while the spell lasts)
  • @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSuggestion]{Suggestion} in one 5-foot square; any creature that enters that square receives the suggestion mentally

Guidance.name: 指導術
Guidance.description: 你觸碰一個自願生物並選擇一項技能。直到法術結束前，該生物可以擲一顆d4，並將其結果加到使用所選技能的任何屬性檢定。

Guiding Bolt.name: 光導箭
Guiding Bolt.description:
你向射程內的一名生物射出光箭，對目標進行一次遠程法術攻擊。命中時，目標承受4d6光耀傷害，並且直到你的下個回合結束前，對其進行的下一次攻擊檢定具有優勢。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d6

Guiding Bolt.name: 光導箭
Guiding Bolt.description: 直到你的下個回合結束前，對其進行的下一次攻擊檢定具有優勢。

Gust of Wind.name: 造風術
Gust of Wind.description:
A Line of strong wind 60 feet long and 10 feet wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the duration. Each creature in the Line must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from you in a direction following the Line. A creature that ends its turn in the Line must make the same save.

Any creature in the Line must spend 2 feet of movement for every 1 foot it moves when moving closer to you.

The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance to extinguish them.

As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can change the direction in which the Line blasts from you.

Hallow.name: 聖居
Hallow.description:
You touch a point and infuse an area around it with holy or unholy power. The area can have a radius up to 60 feet, and the spell fails if the radius includes an area already under the effect of Hallow. The affected area has the following effects.

Hallowed Ward. Choose any of these creature types: Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead. Creatures of the chosen types can’t willingly enter the area, and any creature that is possessed by or that has the Charmed or Frightened condition from such creatures isn’t possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by them while in the area.

Extra Effect. You bind an extra effect to the area from the list below:

Courage. Creatures of any types you choose can’t gain the &Reference[Frightened] condition while in the area.

Darkness. Darkness fills the area. Normal light, as well as magical light created by spells of a level lower than this spell, can’t illuminate the area.

Daylight. Bright light fills the area. Magical Darkness created by spells of a level lower than this spell can’t extinguish the light.

Peaceful Rest. Dead bodies interred in the area can’t be turned into Undead.

Extradimensional Interference. Creatures of any types you choose can’t enter or exit the area using teleportation or interplanar travel.

Fear. Creatures of any types you choose have the &Reference[Frightened] condition while in the area.

Resistance. Creatures of any types you choose have &Reference[damageresistance]{Resistance} to one damage type of your choice while in the area.

Silence. No sound can emanate from within the area, and no sound can reach into it.

Tongues. Creatures of any types you choose can communicate with any other creature in the area even if they don’t share a common language.

Vulnerability. Creatures of any types you choose have &Reference[damagevulnerability]{Vulnerability} to one damage type of your choice while in the area.

Hallucinatory Terrain.name: 幻景
Hallucinatory Terrain.description:
You make natural terrain in a 150-foot Cube in range look, sound, and smell like another sort of natural terrain. Thus, open fields or a road can be made to resemble a swamp, hill, crevasse, or some other difficult or impassable terrain. A pond can be made to seem like a grassy meadow, a precipice like a gentle slope, or a rock-strewn gully like a wide and smooth road. Manufactured structures, equipment, and creatures within the area aren’t changed.

The tactile characteristics of the terrain are unchanged, so creatures entering the area are likely to notice the illusion. If the difference isn’t obvious by touch, a creature examining the illusion can take the Study action to make an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spelldc]] check against your spell save DC to disbelieve it. If a creature discerns that the terrain is illusory, the creature sees a vague image superimposed on the real terrain.

Study.name: Study
Study.condition: Study Action taken by other creature

Harm.name: 傷害術
Harm.description: You unleash virulent magic on a creature you can see within range. The target makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 14d6 Necrotic damage, and its Hit Point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage it took. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage only. This spell can’t reduce a target’s Hit Point maximum below 1.

Haste.name: 加速術
Haste.description:
Choose a willing creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, the target’s Speed is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to Armor Class, it has Advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. That action can be used to take only the Attack (one attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Utilize action.

When the spell ends, the target is &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] and has a Speed of 0 until the end of its next turn, as a wave of lethargy washes over it.

Hasted.name: Hasted
Hasted.description:
Until the spell ends, the target’s Speed is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to Armor Class, it has Advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. That action can be used to take only the Attack (one attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Utilize action.

When the spell ends, the target is Incapacitated and has a Speed of 0 until the end of its next turn, as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHaste00000.ActiveEffect.S5XcFawnnNHO8bUr]{wave of lethargy} washes over it.

Lethargy.name: Lethargy
Lethargy.description: When the spell ends, the target is &Reference[incapacitated apply=false]{無力} and has a Speed of 0 until the end of its next turn, as a wave of lethargy washes over it.

Heal.name: 治癒術
Heal.description:
Choose a creature that you can see within range. Positive energy washes through the target, restoring 70 Hit Points. This spell also ends the &Reference[Blinded], &Reference[Deafened], and &Reference[Poisoned] conditions on the target.

【升環法術效應】 The healing increases by 10 for each spell slot level above 6.

Healing Word.name: 治癒真言
Healing Word.description:
射程內一個你所能看見的生物恢復2d4 + 你的施法屬性調整值的生命值。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，治療量就增加2d4。

Heat Metal.name: 灼熱金屬
Heat Metal.description:
Choose a manufactured metal object, such as a metal weapon or a suit of Heavy or Medium metal armor, that you can see within range. You cause the object to glow red-hot. Any creature in physical contact with the object takes 2d8 Fire damage when you cast the spell. Until the spell ends, you can take a Bonus Action on each of your later turns to deal this damage again if the object is within range.

If a creature is holding or wearing the object and takes the damage from it, the creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or drop the object if it can. If it doesn’t drop the object, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.

【升環法術效應】 法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d8。

Heated Metal.name: Heated Metal
Heated Metal.description: If a creature is holding or wearing the object and takes the damage from it, The creature must succeed on a [[/save ability=con format=long]] or drop the object if it can. If it doesn’t drop the object, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.

Hellish Rebuke.name: 煉獄叱喝
Hellish Rebuke.description:
傷害你的生物暫時被綠色的火焰包圍。其進行一次敏捷豁免，失敗時承受2d10點火焰傷害，成功時傷害減半。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，傷害就增加1d10。

Heroes' Feast.name: 英雄宴
Heroes' Feast.description:
You conjure a feast that appears on a surface in an unoccupied 10-foot Cube next to you. The feast takes 1 hour to consume and disappears at the end of that time, and the beneficial effects don’t set in until this hour is over. Up to twelve creatures can partake of the feast.

A creature that partakes gains several benefits, which last for 24 hours. The creature has &Reference[damageResistance]{Resistance} to Poison damage, and it has Immunity to the &Reference[Frightened] and &Reference[Poisoned] conditions. Its Hit Point maximum also increases by 2d10, and it gains the same number of Hit Points.

Consume Feast.name: Consume Feast
Consume Feast.chatFlavor: Hit Point maximum increased by healing amount

Feast's Benefits.description: The creature has &Reference[damageResistance]{Resistance} to Poison damage, and it has Immunity to the &Reference[Frightened] and &Reference[Poisoned] conditions. Its Hit Point maximum also increases by 2d10, and it gains the same number of Hit Points.
Feast's Benefits.name: Feast's Benefits

Heroism.name: 英雄氣概
Heroism.description:
A willing creature you touch is imbued with bravery. Until the spell ends, the creature is immune to the Frightened condition and gains Temporary Hit Points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns.

【升環法術效應】 法術位每升一個環階，就可以額外選擇一個生物。

Bravery.description: The creature is immune to the Frightened condition and gains Temporary Hit Points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns.
Bravery.name: Bravery

Hex.name: Hex
Hex.description:
You place a curse on a creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack roll. Also, choose one ability when you cast the spell. The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.

If the target drops to 0 Hit Points before this spell ends, you can take a Bonus Action on a later turn to curse a new creature.

【升環法術效應】 Your Concentration can last longer with a spell slot of level 2 (up to 4 hours), 3–4 (up to 8 hours), or 5+ (24 hours).

Hexed Strength.description: The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.
Hexed Strength.name: Hexed Strength

Hexed Intelligence.name: Hexed Intelligence
Hexed Intelligence.description: The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.

Hexed Wisdom.description: The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.
Hexed Wisdom.name: Hexed Wisdom

Hexed Dexterity.description: The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.
Hexed Dexterity.name: Hexed Dexterity

Hexed Charisma.name: Hexed Charisma
Hexed Charisma.description: The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.

Hexed Constitution.description: The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.
Hexed Constitution.name: Hexed Constitution

Bonus Hex Damage.name: Bonus Hex Damage
Bonus Hex Damage.condition: whenever you hit the target with an attack roll

Hold Monster.name: 怪物定身術
Hold Monster.description:
Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Paralyzed condition for the duration. 在目標每回合結束時，其重複豁免，成功時結束自己身上的法術。

【升環法術效應】 You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 5.

Paralyzed.description: 在目標每回合結束時，其重複[[/save ability=wis]]豁免，成功時結束自己身上的法術。
Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed

Hold Person.name: 人類定身術
Hold Person.description:
選擇射程內一個你所能看見的類人生物。目標必須通過一次感知豁免，否則將在法術持續時間內處於&Reference[paralyzed apply=false]{麻痺}狀態。在目標每回合結束時，其重複豁免，成功時結束自己身上的法術。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，就可以額外選擇一個類人生物。

Paralyzed.name: 麻痺
Paralyzed.description: 在目標每回合結束時，其重複[[/save ability=wis]]豁免，成功時結束自己身上的法術。

Hunter's Mark.name: 獵人印記
Hunter's Mark.description:
你可以將範圍內一個你所能看見的生物魔法性地標記為你的獵物。直到法術結束前，每當你以攻擊檢定命中目標，你額外造成1d6力場傷害。此外，你在進行尋找該目標的[[/check ability=wis skill=prc]]或[[/check ability=wis skill=sur]]檢定時具有優勢。

若目標在法術結束前生命值降至0，你可以採取一個附贈動作將印記轉移到一個你所能看見的其他生物上。

【升環法術效應】你的專注可以持續更長時間：3~4環最長8小時，5環以上最長24小時。

Move Mark.condition: when the currently marked target drops to 0 Hit Points
Move Mark.name: Move Mark

Hunter's Mark.description: Until the spell ends, the caster deals an extra [[/damage 1d6 force]] damage to the target whenever they hit it with an attack roll.
Hunter's Mark.name: Hunter's Mark

Hypnotic Pattern.name: 催眠圖紋
Hypnotic Pattern.description:
You create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot Cube within range. The pattern appears for a moment and vanishes. Each creature in the area who can see the pattern must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[charmed apply=false]{魅惑} condition for the duration. While Charmed, the creature has the &Reference[incapacitated apply=false]{無力} condition and a Speed of 0.

The spell ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.

Hypnotized.description:
While &Reference[charmed apply=false]{魅惑}, the creature has the &Reference[incapacitated apply=false]{無力} condition and a Speed of 0.

The spell ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.
Hypnotized.name: Hypnotized

Ice Knife.name: Ice Knife
Ice Knife.description:
You create a shard of ice and fling it at one creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Piercing damage. Hit or miss, the shard then explodes. The target and each creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 Cold damage.

【升環法術效應】 The Cold damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1.

Ice Storm.name: 冰風暴
Ice Storm.description:
Hail falls in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range. Each creature in the Cylinder makes a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 2d10 Bludgeoning damage and 4d6 Cold damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Hailstones turn ground in the Cylinder into &Reference[DifficultTerrain] until the end of your next turn.

【升環法術效應】 The Bludgeoning damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 4.

Identify.name: 鑑定術
Identify.description:
You touch an object throughout the spell’s casting. If the object is a magic item or some other magical object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any ongoing spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn that spell’s name.

If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn which ongoing spells, if any, are currently affecting it.

Illusory Script.name: 迷幻手稿
Illusory Script.description:
你在羊皮紙、紙張或其他適當材料上寫字，並在其上覆蓋一個幻象，持續到法術結束。對你和你在施法時指定的生物來說，文字看起來正常，似乎用你的筆跡書寫，並傳達你想要的含義。對其他所有人來說，這些文字看起來像是用未知或魔法文字書寫的，無法理解。或者，幻象可以改變文字的含義、筆跡和語言，但語言必須是你所知曉的。

若法術被解除，原始文字和幻象都會消失。

具有&Reference[truesight]{真視}能力的生物可以閱讀隱藏的資訊。

Imprisonment.name: 禁錮術
Imprisonment.description:
You create a magical restraint to hold a creature that you can see within range. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the target is unaffected, and it is immune to this spell for the next 24 hours. On a failed save, the target is imprisoned. While imprisoned, the target doesn’t need to breathe, eat, or drink, and it doesn’t age. Divination spells can’t locate or perceive the imprisoned target, and the target can’t teleport.

Until the spell ends, the target is also affected by one of the following effects of your choice:

Burial. The target is entombed beneath the earth in a hollow globe of magical force that is just large enough to contain the target. Nothing can pass into or out of the globe.

Chaining. Chains firmly rooted in the ground hold the target in place. The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition and can’t be moved by any means.

Hedged Prison. The target is trapped in a demiplane that is warded against teleportation and planar travel. The demiplane is your choice of a labyrinth, a cage, a tower, or the like.

Minimus Containment. The target becomes 1 inch tall and is trapped inside an indestructible gemstone or a similar object. Light can pass through the gemstone (allowing the target to see out and other creatures to see in), but nothing else can pass through by any means.

Slumber. The target has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition and can’t be awoken.

Ending the Spell. When you cast the spell, specify a trigger that will end it. The trigger can be as simple or as elaborate as you choose, but the DM must agree that it has a high likelihood of happening within the next decade. The trigger must be an observable action, such as someone making a particular offering at the temple of your god, saving your true love, or defeating a specific monster.

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic} spell can end the spell only if it is cast with a level 9 spell slot, targeting either the prison or the component used to create it.

Hedged Prison.name: Hedged Prison
Hedged Prison.description: The target is trapped in a demiplane that is warded against teleportation and planar travel. The demiplane is your choice of a labyrinth, a cage, a tower, or the like.

Minimus Containment.name: Minimus Containment
Minimus Containment.description: The target becomes 1 inch tall and is trapped inside an indestructible gemstone or a similar object. Light can pass through the gemstone (allowing the target to see out and other creatures to see in), but nothing else can pass through by any means.

Slumber.name: Slumber
Slumber.description: The target has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition and can’t be awoken.

Burial.description: The target is entombed beneath the earth in a hollow globe of magical force that is just large enough to contain the target. Nothing can pass into or out of the globe.
Burial.name: Burial

Chaining.description: Chains firmly rooted in the ground hold the target in place. The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition and can’t be moved by any means.
Chaining.name: Chaining

Incendiary Cloud.name: 焚雲術
Incendiary Cloud.description:
A swirling cloud of embers and smoke fills a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within range. The cloud’s area is &Reference[HeavilyObscured]. It lasts for the duration or until a strong wind (like that created by @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGustofWind]{Gust of Wind}) disperses it.

When the cloud appears, each creature in it makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d8 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature must also make this save when the Sphere moves into its space and when it enters the Sphere or ends its turn there. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

The cloud moves 10 feet away from you in a direction you choose at the start of each of your turns.

Inflict Wounds.name: 造成傷勢
Inflict Wounds.description:
A creature you touch makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

【升環法術效應】 The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 1.

Insect Plague.name: 疫病蟲群
Insect Plague.description:
Swarming locusts fill a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The Sphere remains for the duration, and its area is &Reference[LightlyObscured] and &Reference[DifficultTerrain].

When the swarm appears, each creature in it makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 4d10 Piercing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature also makes this save when it enters the spell’s area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

【升環法術效應】The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 5.

Invisibility.name: 隱形術
Invisibility.description:
一個你所觸碰的生物獲得&Reference[invisible apply=false]{隱形}狀態直到法術結束。緊接在目標進行攻擊檢定、造成傷害或施放法術後，法術將提前結束。

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，就可以額外選擇一個生物。

Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.
Invisible.name: Invisible

Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance.name: Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance
Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance.description:
You unleash a storm of flashing light and raging thunder in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point you can see within range. While in this area, creatures have the &Reference[Blinded apply=false]{目盲} and &Reference[Deafened apply=false]{耳聾} conditions, and they can’t cast spells with a Verbal component.

When the storm appears, each creature in it makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 Radiant damage and 2d10 Thunder damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature also makes this save when it enters the spell’s area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

【升環法術效應】 The Radiant and Thunder damage increase by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 5.

Senses Overwhelmed.description: While in this area, creatures have the &Reference[Blinded apply=false]{目盲} and &Reference[Deafened apply=false]{耳聾} conditions, and they can’t cast spells with a Verbal component.
Senses Overwhelmed.name: Senses Overwhelmed

Jump.name: 跳躍術
Jump.description:
You touch a willing creature. Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, that creature can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

【升環法術效應】法術位每升一個環階，就可以額外選擇一個生物。
Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, that creature can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.
Jump.name: Jump

Knock.name: 敲擊術
Knock.description:
選擇一個射程內你所能看見的一個物體。這個物品可以是一扇門、一個盒子、一個寶箱、一副鐐銬、一個掛鎖、或其他包含著以尋常或魔法方式阻止他人使用的物體。

<一個被尋常鎖關住、釘住、或閂住的物體將被解鎖、解封、或被解閂。如果該物體被複數道鎖給鎖上，則只有其中一個會被解鎖。

若你選擇一個被祕法鎖給關住的目標，則該法術將被壓制10分鐘，在這段時間內可以將目標正常地打開或關上。

當你施放此法術時，一個距離300呎內都能被聽見的響亮敲擊聲將從目標物體上發出。

Legend Lore.name: 通曉傳奇
Legend Lore.description:
Name or describe a famous person, place, or object. The spell brings to your mind a brief summary of the significant lore about that famous thing, as described by the DM.

The lore might consist of important details, amusing revelations, or even secret lore that has never been widely known. The more information you already know about the thing, the more precise and detailed the information you receive is. That information is accurate but might be couched in figurative language or poetry, as determined by the DM.

If the famous thing you chose isn’t actually famous, you hear sad musical notes played on a trombone, and the spell fails.

Leomund's Secret Chest.name: Leomund's Secret Chest
Leomund's Secret Chest.description:
You hide a chest and all its contents on the Ethereal Plane. You must touch the chest and the miniature replica that serve as Material components for the spell. The chest can contain up to 12 cubic feet of nonliving material (3 feet by 2 feet by 2 feet).

While the chest remains on the Ethereal Plane, you can take a Magic action and touch the replica to recall the chest. It appears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 feet of you. You can send the chest back to the Ethereal Plane by taking a Magic action to touch the chest and the replica.

After 60 days, there is a cumulative 5 percent chance at the end of each day that the spell ends. The spell also ends if you cast this spell again or if the Tiny replica chest is destroyed. If the spell ends and the larger chest is on the Ethereal Plane, the chest remains there for you or someone else to find.

Foundry Note

The Recall Chest activity will summon a linked Actor associated with this specific spell Item to serve as the chest.

Leomund's Tiny Hut.name: Leomund's Tiny Hut
Leomund's Tiny Hut.description:
A 10-foot Emanation springs into existence around you and remains stationary for the duration. The spell fails when you cast it if the Emanation isn’t big enough to fully encapsulate all creatures in its area.

Creatures and objects within the Emanation when you cast the spell can move through it freely. All other creatures and objects are barred from passing through it. Spells of level 3 or lower can’t be cast through it, and the effects of such spells can’t extend into it.

The atmosphere inside the Emanation is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. Until the spell ends, you can command the interior to have &Reference[dimlight]{微光} or &Reference[darkness]{黑暗} (no action required). The Emanation is opaque from the outside and of any color you choose, but it’s transparent from the inside.

The spell ends early if you leave the Emanation or if you cast it again.

Lesser Restoration.name: 次級復原術
Lesser Restoration.description: 你觸摸一個生物並結束其狀態：&Reference[blinded]{目盲}、&Reference[deafened]{耳聾}、&Reference[paralyzed]{麻痺}或&Reference[poisoned]{中毒}。

Levitate.name: 浮空術
Levitate.description:
One creature or loose object of your choice that you can see within range rises vertically up to 20 feet and remains suspended there for the duration. The spell can levitate an object that weighs up to 500 pounds. An unwilling creature that succeeds on a Constitution saving throw is unaffected.

The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing. You can change the target’s altitude by up to 20 feet in either direction on your turn. If you are the target, you can move up or down as part of your move. Otherwise, you can take a Magic action to move the target, which must remain within the spell’s range.

When the spell ends, the target floats gently to the ground if it is still aloft.

Levitating.name: Levitating
Levitating.description: The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing.

Light.name: 光亮術
Light.description:
你觸摸一個目前未被其他生物穿著或攜帶的大型或更小的物體。直到法術結束前，該物體散發20呎明亮光照，再延伸出20呎微光光照區域。光線的顏色可以根據你的喜好進行設置。

以不透明的物體覆蓋該物體可以阻擋光線。若你再次施法，則法術終止。

Lightning Arrow.name: 閃電箭
Lightning Arrow.description:
As your attack hits or misses the target, the weapon or ammunition you’re using transforms into a lightning bolt. Instead of taking any damage or other effects from the attack, the target takes 4d8 Lightning damage on a hit or half as much damage on a miss. Each creature within 10 feet of the target then makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

The weapon or ammunition then returns to its normal form.

【升環法術效應】 The damage for both effects of the spell increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

Lightning Bolt.name: 閃電束
Lightning Bolt.description:
